market_pulse: Competitive momentum steady across Strip venues with David Guetta, Tiësto, and emerging tech-house rotation (Westend, NOIZU) signaling strong summer readiness.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily leveraging BTS prep content, VIP access footage, talent walkthrough videos. LIV currently low on BTS narrative.

content_gaps.description: Competitors running active UGC campaigns with hashtag contests and repost features. LIV minimal UGC amplification.

content_gaps.description: Competitors dedicating 3-5 posts/week per resident DJ. LIV mentions artists but minimal residency-specific content series.
